configuration.memory_measurement: psutil process-tree peak resident set size

request_measurement.pip_audit: not exposed by pip-audit; recorded as null

cases.description: One hundred real PyPI pins mixing expected-clean packages with historically vulnerable releases.
PEP 508 markers and extras that should be interpreted consistently by both tools.
Compatible modern roots used for complete resolver correctness and performance evidence.
Small direct-pin workload for selected-artifact provenance and static inspection evidence.
Index directives and private-package names retained for parser and dependency-confusion coverage.
VCS, direct URL, and editable dependencies that are intentionally excluded from cross-tool timing.
Hash-pinned pip-tools style output for lockfile hash-preservation checks.
uv lockfile shape with registry sources.
Poetry lockfile shape with file hashes.
Intentionally malformed requirement lines that must fail closed.
